author: nuella201
title: I would like to request a refund, as it is a fairly large amount in my opinion.
content: I am requesting a full refund for an accidental subscription renewal of the 'EverTag' app (IDR 229,000). I did not intend to renew this subscription and I have already canceled it. I have not used the premium features since the renewal. Please process my refund to my original payment method. Thank you.

author: Aleajandra20
title: Tag editor app
content: The best tag editor app 👍 thanks 🔥
